patches.hypothesis: The overfitting issue arises from handling charset switching without robust conditions and validation. The refined fix ensures charset validation handles edge cases of non-encodable charsets, falling back to a general encodable charset (UTF-8) and updating the document meta tag when necessary. This refined approach processes various input cases correctly and maintains the integrity of the resultant document.
patches.original_hypothesis: The method fails to set the charset to UTF-8 when the detected charset can't be used for encoding. The fallback logic to UTF-8 isn't properly engaging due to absence of proper checks.

patches.hypothesis: The method doesn't change the charset to UTF-8 when the provided charset can't encode the data, which causes the test to fail because it expects UTF-8.
patches.changes: + Add logic to check if the charset can encode the document; if not, change to UTF-8
patches.diff: + Add logic to check if the charset can encode the document; if not, change to UTF-8
